## Entities.Confections.AnyFillingOptionEntity type

Discriminated union of filling options. Satisfies IHasId<FillingOptionId> for use with IOptionsWithPreferred.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyFillingOptionEntity = IRecipeFillingOptionEntity | IIngredientFillingOptionEntity;
```
